title: LyamRay's Chirstmas Pack!
description: This texturepack has some unique features that makes your world a unique christmas-themed world!
body:
**LyamRay's Christmas-Pack: A Christmas Texture Pack for Minecraft 1.21.3!**

_Transform your Minecraft world into a magical winter wonderland with LyamRay's Christmas-Pack! This Christmas-themed texture pack brings festive charm and cozy holiday vibes to every block and biome. Here's what you can expect:_

🎄 **Holiday Blocks Galore:**

- Snow-dusted grass and frosted trees. {Working on it..}
- Sparkling presents replacing chests!
- Sparklin present replacing the ender-chest!

🎅 **Character Overhaul:**

- Adorable Santa hats for villagers. {Working on it..}
- A whole Snowman remake.
- A reindeer-inspired texture for horses!

❄️ **Environment Enhancements:**

- A magical winter sky with auroras and softly falling snowflakes.
- Twinkling stars and icy moon textures.

🛠️ **Item Redesigns:**

- Candy cane swords, gingerbread shields, and Christmas cookie food items.
- Glimmering ornaments and gift-wrapped tools.

🎁 **Bonus Features:**

- Custom Christmas music and jingles for added cheer.
- Delightful ambient sounds, like crackling fires and sleigh bells.

Get ready to celebrate the season in LyamRay's Christmas-Pack! Perfect for adventurers looking to add warmth, sparkle, and a touch of holiday magic to Minecraft 1.21.3. 🎉

**Download now and let the festivities begin!**


**How to use this texturepack?**
- Download this texturepack.
- Move this texturepack from your download folder into your resourcepack folder.
  Example:
     C:\Users\lyamr\Downloads>LyamRay's Christmas-Pack.zip -> C:\Users\lyamr\AppData\Roaming\.minecraft\resourcepacks
- Go launch your minecraft and enable the texturepack ingame.
- Enjoy this wonderfull texturepack and happy holidays! :)
